  • Uses of Day in DAO

    Methods in DAO with parameters of type Day
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private int
    ReservationDAO.dayToMySQLDay(Day day)
    Converts the internal Day enum to the corresponding MySQL DAYOFWEEK integer.
    boolean
    RestaurantSettingsDAO.deleteWeeklyOpeningHours(Day day)
    Removes the schedule for a specific day from the database.
    boolean
    RestaurantSettingsDAO.existsDay(Day day)
    Checks if a configuration for a specific day already exists in the database. * @param day the Day to check.
    List<Reservation>
    ReservationDAO.getReservationsByDay(Day day)
    Retrieves reservations based on the day of the week.
    Boolean
    RestaurantSettingsDAO.updateClosingHours(RestaurantSettings r, Day d)
    Updates only the closing time for a specific day using the main settings object. * @param r the RestaurantSettings object.
    Boolean
    RestaurantSettingsDAO.updateOpeningHours(RestaurantSettings r, Day d)
    Updates only the opening time for a specific day using the main settings object. * @param r the RestaurantSettings object.

    Enum representing the days of the week.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    WeeklyOpeningHours
    RestaurantSettingsController.getOpeningHoursForDay(Day day)
    Retrieves the standard opening hours for a specific day of the week.
    boolean
    RestaurantSettingsController.isDayExisting(Day day)
    Checks if a specific day of the week has opening hours defined in the local settings.
    boolean
    RestaurantSettingsController.removeWeeklyOpeningHours(Day day)
    Removes a weekly opening hours entry for a specific day and cancels all reservations on that day.

    Method
    Description
    Day

    Returns the day for which the opening hours deletion is requested.

    Returns the day of the week associated with this request.
    Constructors in messages with parameters of type Day
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    DeleteOpeningHoursRequest(Day day)
    Constructs a new request to delete opening hours for the specified day.
     
    updateRegularClosingTimeRequest(Day day, LocalTime closingTime)
    Constructs a new updateRegularClosingTimeRequest with the specified day and time.
     
    updateRegularOpeningTimeRequest(Day day, LocalTime openingTime)
    Constructs a new updateRegularOpeningTimeRequest with the specified day and opening time.
